use_cases: Adjusting display brightness settings in system preferences
Controlling theme brightness levels in app customization panels
Managing light intensity in smart home device interfaces
Setting night mode intensity in media playback applications
Configuring interface luminance in developer tool settings
ai_summary: A brightness control stepper component featuring increment/decrement buttons to adjust brightness levels (0-6). The component dynamically changes its icon based on brightness state (moon, sun-dim, sun) with smooth morphing transitions. Includes hover and tap animations for tactile feedback, number transitions with AnimatePresence, and proper accessibility support via ARIA attributes. Ideal for settings interfaces, theme customizers, and display control panels in web applications.
